name: Jalapeno Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon (or up to 1 tsp) jalapeno flakes, dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the semolina flour and jalapeno flakes in a bowl.
2. Add the egg and mix until a dough forms.
3. Gradually add water or jalapeno liquid as needed to reach a workable consistency.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 5-10 minutes.
5. Let the dough rest for at least 30 minutes before rolling out and cutting into pasta.
